description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Claude Code that triggers on issue comments, pull request review comments, issues, and pull request reviews. When triggered by a comment or review containing @claude, run a job on ubuntu-latest with write permissions to repository contents, pull requests, and issues. The job checks out the repository, then runs the Claude Code action with an Anthropic API key from secrets, allowing it to read CI results on PRs and customize its behavior with various optional settings.
